data.title: "The Dark Knight" screenwriter David Goyer launches blockchain-powered sci-fi project "Emergence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known screenwriter David S. Goyer (representative works include "The Dark Knight", "Blade" and Apple TV+ series "Foundation") announced at the 2025 Toronto Consensus Conference that he would launch a new science fiction project "Emergence". The project is based on the blockchain platform Incention he founded, and aims to build a cross-media narrative universe co-created by the community through Web3 technology and AI tools. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Crypto KOL POW sells 14 million LAUNCHCOINs in exchange for 16,071 SOLs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, crypto KOL pow (@traderpow) sold 14 million LAUNCHCOIN at $0.197 per coin today, in exchange for 16,071 SOL (about $2.76 million), and currently still holds 3 million LAUNCHCOIN (about $553,000).

data.title: Ukraine Considers Building a Strategic Cryptocurrency Reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ukrainian government is preparing legislation to establish a national strategic Bitcoin reserve. It is reported that Ukraine currently holds about 46,351 BTC, worth about US$4.8 billion. These bitcoins mainly come from donations, asset seizures and fundraising activities during the war. Ukrainian MP Yaroslav Zhelezniak said that the relevant bill has entered the final drafting stage and is expected to be submitted to parliament for deliberation soon. The bill aims to formally incorporate Bitcoin into the national fiscal strategy. Cryptocurrency exchange Binance is assisting Ukraine in advancing the plan, but stressed the need for major legislative reforms. Previously, the Ukrainian parliament passed a virtual asset bill, but it was withdrawn under pressure from the presidential office and the National Securities Committee. Currently, the National Securities Committee has proposed 80 amendments to improve the legal framework for crypto assets. Ukraine's move marks its increasing emphasis on cryptocurrencies in its national financial strategy. (Decrypt)

data.title: USDJ officially launches Sunset Plan, plans to exit in a gradual and orderly manner
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official information, USDJ has officially launched the "Sunset Plan" and plans to complete all transition work to exit the market by August 31, 2025. The decision aims to follow the development trend of the DeFi industry, optimize resource allocation, and gradually shift the focus to more efficient new generation stablecoins such as USDD in the TRON ecosystem. From May 16, JustLend DAO will suspend the deposit and lending functions of the new USDJ, and existing positions will not be affected. The platform will also gradually reduce the collateral rate of USDJ as appropriate, and it is recommended that relevant users pay attention and adjust their asset structure in a timely manner to avoid potential liquidation risks. During the transition period, the official promise is to continue to maintain the liquidity of USDJ on mainstream DEX (such as SunSwap) and provide convenient channels for asset exchange such as USDD and USDT. J

data.title: Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of some assets in the unified account
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of some assets in the unified account at 14:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on May 23, 2025. This update will be completed in about an hour. The collateral ratio will affect the maintenance margin ratio (uniMMR). Users should closely monitor the maintenance margin ratio of the unified account to avoid any potential liquidation or losses that may result from asset collateral ratio adjustments.

data.title: MiCA Implementation Challenges and Opportunities in the EU Crypto Market
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the European Union's Markets in Crypto-Assets regulation, commonly referred to as MiCA, is entering a crucial phase of implementation. This regulation aims to harmonize crypto regulations across the 27 EU member states, offering clarity, consumer protection, and long-term market stability. However, as the implementation process unfolds, several challenges are emerging.

As of January 2025, crypto asset service providers (CASPs) have started acquiring licenses to operate legally within the EU. A transitional period, or "grandfathering" phase, grants existing firms up to 18 months to comply, depending on the member state. With deadlines looming, companies are under pressure to act swiftly. One of MiCA's most contentious provisions pertains to stablecoins. The regulation stipulates that no stablecoin can be offered to EU users unless the issuer is authorized within the EU and publishes a regulator-approved white paper. Additionally, strict rules concerning asset reserves, governance, conflict of interest, and marketing are enforced. Issuers are prohibited from offering interest on tokens, eliminating a common incentive for adoption. Tether's USDt (USDT), the world's most-used stablecoin, has announced it will not seek MiCA compliance, potentially leading exchanges to delist it across the EU. This decision could significantly impact liquidity, retail access, and DeFi activities in the region.

While some firms resist compliance, others are embracing the new regulations. BitGo, a crypto custody firm, has recently secured a MiCA-aligned license in Germany, positioning itself to cater to institutional clients across Europe. Brett Reeves, head of Go Network and European Sales at BitGo, emphasized that the license is not solely about compliance but also about aligning with Europe's evolving regulatory landscape. He noted that interactions with BaFin and European regulators have been relatively straightforward, with regulators ensuring that processes are robust and compliant. Erwin Voloder, head of policy at the European Blockchain Association, highlighted the importance of consistent national-level interpretation and improved guidance from regulators to prevent fragmentation. As MiCA continues to shape the EU crypto market, firms must navigate the complexities of compliance while seizing strategic opportunities. The regulation's impact on stablecoins and the broader market remains a focal point for industry stakeholders.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury pivot lifts luxury watchmaker stock more than 60%
data.description:
Luxury watchmaker Top Win has rebranded to AsiaStrategy and is adopting a Bitcoin accumulation strategy. In a May 16 announcement, AsiaStrategy said it is partnering with Sora Ventures to adopt a Bitcoin (BTC) treasury strategy. Sora previously partnered with Metaplanet in 2024 to create Japan’s first corporate Bitcoin treasury. The stock market took immediate notice of the announcement
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-treasury-pivot-boosts-watchmaker-stock-60-percent?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Luxury watchmaker Top Win changes its name to AsiaStrategy and launches Bitcoin reserve strategy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Asian luxury watchmaker Top Win announced that it would change its name to AsiaStrategy and cooperate with Sora Ventures to launch a Bitcoin reserve strategy. This move caused its stock price to rise by more than 60% in pre-market trading, from $7.50 at the close of May 15 to $12.12. 
AsiaStrategy said it would adopt a Bitcoin accumulation strategy while continuing its watch manufacturing business. It is reported that Sora Ventures founder Jason Fang will join the AsiaStrategy board of directors and serve as co-CEO with current CEO Tony Ngai. Sora Ventures assisted the Japanese company Metaplanet in launching the first enterprise-level Bitcoin reserve plan in 2024. This transformation makes AsiaStrategy the latest listed company to adopt a Bitcoin reserve strategy after Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and Metaplanet. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bloomberg: Galaxy Digital and the US SEC start consultations on stock tokenization
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Galaxy Digital Holdings Ltd. is in talks with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) about plans to tokenize its own stocks and other securities. The company plans to use its digital asset platform to convert traditional stocks into tokens on the blockchain to improve trading efficiency and market transparency. Galaxy Digital founder and CEO Michael Novogratz said the move is aimed at promoting the digital transformation of traditional financial assets and enhancing market liquidity and accessibility. Currently, the plan is still in the preliminary discussion stage, and the specific implementation timetable and regulatory framework have not yet been determined. (Bloomberg)

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in May was 7.3%, the expected value was 6.5%, and the previous value was 6.5%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The initial value of the expected one-year inflation rate in the United States in May is 7.3%, the expected value is 6.50%, and the previous value is 6.50%.
The initial value of the expected five- to ten-year inflation rate in the United States in May is 4.6%, the expected value is 4.40%, and the previous value is 4.40%.
The initial value of the University of Michigan Consumer Confidence Index in the United States in May is 50.8, the expected value is 53.4, and the previous value is 52.2. (Jinshi)

data.title: Analysis: Binance Alpha Token Drives BNB Chain Activity, Weekly Volume Increases Over 114%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance Alpha has significantly improved the on-chain activity of BNB Chain. Data shows that BNB Chain's weekly transaction volume has increased by 114.6%, with more than 1 million new addresses added daily. Of the first batch of Alpha tokens launched, 71% chose to be deployed on BNB Chain, 60% were released through the Initial DEX Offering (IDO) module of Binance Wallet, and the rest were launched through Launchpad and Launchpool. Among the top 20 Alpha tokens in terms of current trading volume, 9 are native to BNB Chain, including BSquared Network (B2), OKZOO (AIOT), Polyhedra Network (ZKJ), etc. In addition, more than 50% of the liquidity of some projects such as Haedal Protocol and Polyhedra Network has been deployed on BNB Chain, driving the growth of the total locked value (TVL) of the chain. Binance also further incentivized users to participate in Alpha token trading through the Binance Alpha Points event and trading competitions, which strengthened the demand for BNB. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: U.S. Inflation and Consumer Confidence Data for May Released
data.description: According to Odaily, the preliminary estimate for the United States' one-year inflation rate in May stands at 7.3%, surpassing the expected 6.50% and the previous value of 6.50%. Additionally, the five to ten-year inflation rate forecast for May is initially estimated at 4.6%, higher than the anticipated 4.40% and the prior figure of 4.40%. Meanwhile, the University of Michigan's preliminary consumer confidence index for May is reported at 50.8, falling short of the expected 53.4 and the previous value of 52.2.

data.title: Fidelity: BTC acceleration phase is still continuing, and will continue to set new highs before the end of this cycle
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Fidelity Digital Assets posted on the X platform that after 69 days of low profits and high volatility, Bitcoin's acceleration phase continues. This trend strengthens the Fidelity team's argument that Bitcoin may hit a new all-time high before the end of this cycle.

data.title: Believe founder: System issues are being fixed and creators will receive fees as planned
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Believe founder Ben Pasternak posted on the X platform, "I've seen a lot of concerns about handling fees, and there will be more explanations later. In short: we are receiving a large amount of transactions, which has caused problems in many systems, and we are fixing it. I have seen many error messages related to handling fees on the X platform. All creators will receive the fees as planned, and the repair may take a little time."

data.title: U.S. Mining Firm's Bitcoin Purchase Plan Stalls
data.description: According to Foresight News, HODL15Capital has revealed that despite the announcement by U.S. mining company Critical Metal Corps in January to purchase $500 million worth of Bitcoin, there have been no acquisitions or updates since then.

data.title: Bitcoin's Accelerated Phase Continues Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Odaily, Fidelity Digital Assets recently stated on the X platform that Bitcoin's accelerated phase is ongoing after experiencing 69 days of low profitability and high volatility. This trend supports Fidelity's argument that Bitcoin may reach a new all-time high before the end of the current cycle.
